name: Angel Hair Pesto Primavera
recipeIngredient: 32 ounces Angel hair pasta - cooked al dente
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine the olive oil, fresh basil, pine nuts, and garlic. Blend until a paste forms.
2. Add salt and white pepper; mix well. Set aside.
3. Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat until melted.
4. Add shallots, chopped basil, broccoli, carrots, zucchini, and snow peas. Sauté for 3 to 4 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
5. Stir in heavy cream; bring mixture to a boil.
6. Add cooked pasta and pesto; stir well.
7. Season with salt and white pepper.
8. Divide pasta among four serving plates. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
